query_title: Seeking a Friend for the End of the World

recommendations.title: Miss March
recommendations.overview: A young man awakens from a four-year coma to hear that his once virginal high-school sweetheart has since become a centerfold in one of the world's most famous men's magazines. He and his sex-crazed best friend decide to take a cross-country road tri

recommendations.title: Through My Window: Across the Sea
recommendations.overview: After a year of long-distance, Raquel and Ares reunite on a steamy beach trip. Faced with fresh flirtations and insecurities, will their love prevail?

recommendations.title: Your Christmas or Mine 2
recommendations.overview: They've swapped Christmas – again. Can Hayley and James' relationship survive another turbulent family Christmas or has their future together gone off-piste?!

recommendations.title: Meet the Leroys
recommendations.overview: A man takes his wife and their teenage children on a road trip down memory lane while facing divorce.

recommendations.title: 4L
recommendations.overview: To find Joseba, a dying friend, and see him reunite with his daughter Ely, two old friends, Jean Pierre and Tocho, embark with her on a road trip through the Sahara desert, from Spain to Mali.

recommendations.title: The Spirit of Christmas
recommendations.overview: A woman falls in love with a man who is somewhat unavailable.
Two university students gain insight into life and love as they get to know each other during a road trip across Europe.

recommendations.title: Kites
recommendations.overview: A wounded man searches for his sweetheart in the Mexican desert while on the run from the police, bounty hunters, and others.

recommendations.title: Herbie Fully Loaded
recommendations.overview: Maggie Peyton, the new owner of Number 53 - the free-wheelin' Volkswagen bug with a mind of its own - puts the car through its paces on the road to becoming a NASCAR competitor.

recommendations.title: Queens on the Run
recommendations.overview: When four women finally take the road trip they planned in high school, they have no idea of the things they'll bump into... sometimes literally.
